_source: Recording Engineer's Handbook, Sound on Sound magazine, MusicTech, Pensado's Place
_note: Long-tail production data. Specific settings that make professional tracks stand out.

sub_bass.feel: Feel rather than hear; mono only
sub_bass.tip: High-pass most instruments below 80Hz to clean up mix

bass.tip: Kick drum fundamental 60-100Hz; bass guitar 80-200Hz; compete for space

low_mid.tip: Cut 200-400Hz on most instruments to clean up mix (muddy zone)

mid.tip: Boost 1-2kHz for cut; cut 500-800Hz to reduce boxiness

high_mid.tip: 3-5kHz de-ess region for vocals; boost for attack on snare

eq_fundamentals.surgical_vs_broad: Narrow Q (0.5-1) for cuts/problem frequencies. Wide Q (2-4) for boosts.
eq_fundamentals.subtractive_first: Cut problems before boosting; less phase issues; cleaner result

release.fast: 50-100ms; can sound pumpy on slow material
release.auto: Many compressors have program-dependent auto release

compression.parallel_compression: Blend dry + compressed signal; keeps transients but adds sustain; NYC compression technique

types.room: Small, realistic space; 50-200ms pre-delay; drums, percussion
types.hall: Large natural space; 1-3s decay; strings, orchestral
types.convolution: Impulse response of real space; realistic but CPU heavy

reverb.send_reverb_rule: Never insert reverb on track; use send/return; keeps reverb controllable + saves CPU
reverb.pre_delay: 10-30ms gap before reverb; separates dry signal; helps clarity
reverb.room_in_a_box: Put all instruments in same reverb at different levels to create coherent 3D space

stereo_field.mono_rule: Sub bass + kick + bass MUST be mono; stereo low end causes phase issues on mono systems
stereo_field.widening: Mid-Side EQ: boost S channel 8-12kHz adds width; cut M channel adds sense of space
stereo_field.pan_law: -3dB or -6dB when centered vs panned; compensate gain when panning
stereo_field.haas_effect: Delay one channel 10-30ms from other; perceived as stereo width (binaural fusion)

loudness_targets.note: Integrated LUFS (loudness units relative to full scale); use Youlean meter or iZotope

mastering.true_peak: Never exceed -1dBTP (true peak); prevents inter-sample peaks causing distortion on streaming
mastering_chain_order: EQ (corrective) → Compression → EQ (tonal) → Stereo Enhancement → Limiter
mastering.loudness_war_note: Over-limiting squashes dynamics; modern streaming normalizes anyway; aim for quality not loudness

trap.drums: Roland TR-808 bass drum with pitch/decay; hi-hat rolls (1/8 to 1/32 triplets); clap on 2+4
trap.808_tuning: Tune 808 to key of song; 808 is pitched — B, C, Db, F are common starting notes
trap.melodies: Minor key; simple 4-8 note melodies; lots of space; slight detuning for feel

house.drums: Four-on-the-floor kick (every quarter note); open hi-hat on off-beats; clap or snare on 2+4
house.bassline: Pumping sidechain compression against kick; synth bass or Chicago piano
house.arrangement: 32-bar sections; breakdown at 3-4 min mark; 8-bar builds; kick drops

lo_fi_hip_hop.production: Chop and pitch-shift sample; add vinyl crackle, tape hiss; detuned instruments
lo_fi_hip_hop.drums: Boom bap pattern; slightly behind the beat (laid back feel); shuffled hi-hats
lo_fi_hip_hop.recording_trick: Record through cheap cassette deck for authentic lo-fi texture
lo_fi_hip_hop.chord_extensions: Maj7, min9, 9sus4 voicings on piano or Rhodes

edm_progressive_house.drop_design: 2-bar tension (no kick) → 1-bar anticipation → DROP (kick + bass + synths + FX)
edm_progressive_house.supersaw_chord: Detune 7 sawtooth oscillators; spread across stereo; massive chord sound
edm_progressive_house.buildup_elements: Riser (pitch up); snare roll (accelerating 1/4 → 1/8 → 1/16); filter open; white noise
edm_progressive_house.fx_automation: Filter cutoff, reverb wet, delay feedback — automate aggressively during transitions

synthesis_types.subtractive: Start with harmonically rich wave (saw, square); filter down; most common (Moog, Prophet-5)
synthesis_types.additive: Build from sine waves; complex timbres; very CPU heavy historically
synthesis_types.fm_synthesis: Frequency modulation; complex metallic/bell timbres; Yamaha DX7 (80s sound); great for keys
synthesis_types.wavetable: Scan through wave tables; modern evolution; Serum, Vital, Massive
synthesis_types.granular: Chop sample into grains; manipulate; excellent for textures/atmospheres

foley_and_sampling.transient_design: High-pass + heavy attack compression on attack layer; add crack to any hit
foley_and_sampling.pitch_shifting_limit: ±5 semitones without artifacts; beyond use formant correction
